IVX HOLDINGS â€” FINAL RELEASE AUTHORIZATION

OBJECTIVE

Engineering is complete.

Feature Freeze remains active.

Do not reopen completed modules.

Do not generate additional audits.

Execute only the final production release process.

==================================================
PHASE 1 â€” VERIFY RELEASE ARTIFACTS
==================================================

Verify and return:

âś“ Android APK
âś“ Android AAB
âś“ Version
âś“ Build Number
âś“ Package Name
âś“ SHA-256
âś“ Commit SHA
âś“ Deployment ID
âś“ GitHub HEAD
âś“ Render Live SHA
âś“ /version SHA

All three SHAs must match.

==================================================
PHASE 2 â€” VERIFY PRODUCTION
==================================================

Verify live production:

âś“ /health = HTTP 200
âś“ /version = current commit
âś“ /readiness = ready
âś“ AI Gateway operational
âś“ Supabase healthy
âś“ Storage healthy
âś“ Realtime healthy

Return production evidence.

==================================================
PHASE 3 â€” OWNER DEVICE VALIDATION
==================================================

Android

Status:

PENDING OWNER VALIDATION

Owner checklist:

â–ˇ Install APK
â–ˇ Upgrade from previous version

iPhone

Status:

PENDING OWNER VALIDATION

Owner checklist:

â–ˇ Build
â–ˇ Install
â–ˇ Login
â–ˇ Feed
â–ˇ Chat
â–ˇ Upload
â–ˇ Notifications
â–ˇ AI

Do NOT classify these as BLOCKED.

==================================================
PHASE 4 â€” RELEASE LOCK
==================================================

Freeze:

âś“ Backend
âś“ Database
âś“ API
âś“ Authentication
âś“ Chat
âś“ Feed
âś“ Media
âś“ AI
âś“ Dashboard

Only critical production fixes are allowed after this point.

==================================================
PHASE 5 â€” FINAL DELIVERY
==================================================

Return only:

1. APK download location
2. AAB download location
3. iOS build status
4. Version
5. Build number
6. Package name
7. Commit SHA
8. Deployment ID
9. Enterprise Readiness Score
10. Production Status

==================================================
FINAL STATUS
==================================================

If engineering is complete:

STATUS:

STATUS:

Wait only for owner device validation and any critical bugs found during that validation.
